title: Warden & Sculk
description: This mod adds all related to Warden and deep dark
body:
### *Warden & Sculk  *

This mod uses GeckoLib API on 2.6.0 (W&S version) or higher (1.18.2 minecraft version)

and Terrablender (version range from 1.0.0.59) on 3.0.0 (W&S version) or higher (1.18.2 minecraft version)

also 2.6.0 (W&S version) or higher (1.16.5 minecraft version)
![RocketNode Hosting](https://i.ibb.co/M50jMdF/VICALE-rocketnode.png)

![Warden logo](https://i.ibb.co/b1tKxT4/warden-logo-curseforge.png)
[GeckoLib  <--- Link (1.16.5)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib/files/3929996)

[GeckoLib <--- Link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib/files/3929996)

[Terrablender Forge <--- Link (1.18.2)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/terrablender/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20&version=1.18.2&gameVersionTypeId=1)

[Github (Not source)](https://github.com/Vicale200/the_warden)



## SOCIAL

You can support me on Ko-Fi :)

![Ko-Fi](https://storage.ko-fi.com/cdn/logomarkLogo.png)

You can check my instagram "@vicalisito_modder" :) 



## Warden



Warden is a big hostile mob with 500 pts of health (250 hearts). He has two forms of attack , one ranged (Sonic Boom) and melee:



Melee damage:



Easy: 18pts(9 hearts)
Normal: 30pts(15 hearts)
Hard: 45pts(22.5 hearts)



You can change it's health, attack, range and speed with the config file "warden_and_sculk-common.toml". Take care when it has less than 100pts because he can break some blocks.



(Some Warden images)
![Warden](https://i.ibb.co/C97DrXG/2022-07-10-23-26-17.png)

![Warden](https://i.ibb.co/93Ypcrs/2022-07-10-23-14-57.png)



## Ancient Cities (1.18.2)

It's a huge structure that can be generated on the deep dark biome. This structures start with the portal and finishes with a lot of bridges connecting to rooms. You can find chests and some secrets here.


## Sculk Shrieker





This block can summon Wardens just if a near sculk sensor detects a vibration caused by players. Once is active it will summon a Warden (if there aren't any Wardens) near the Sculk Shrieker. This block can give you the darkness effect and it has two states. 



When you place this block on survival or is generated by sculk catalyst then it can't summon Wardens.



(Sculk Shrieker images: When it summons a Warden)
![Sculk Shrieker](https://i.ibb.co/Rb3d1MX/2022-07-10-23-25-11.png)

![Sculk Shrieker Summon](https://i.ibb.co/nsLrs0H/2022-07-10-23-26-16.png)




(Sculk shrieker image: First can summon and the other no)
![Sculk Shrieker Powered](https://i.ibb.co/X4hqn7M/2022-07-10-23-29-42.png)




## Recovery compass

![Recovery Compass](https://i.ibb.co/HFYFfF2/2022-07-10-23-27-29.png)



It can be crafted with 8 echo shards and one compass (echo shards can be obtained on chests). This item will show the direction of your last death position.
